name: claude-code-adversarial-review
description: Adversarially review Claude Code changes from Codex with evidence-first findings.

interface.shortDescription: Review Claude Code changes as a skeptical external reviewer.
interface.longDescription: Claude Code Adversarial Review gives Codex a strict evidence-first review workflow for Claude Code output: inspect the actual diff, verify every finding at file and line level, separate true defects from false positives, and block completion on unresolved high-impact issues.
defaultPrompt: Use Claude Code Adversarial Review on this diff
Review Claude Code's changes for bugs and regressions
